config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I believe society is strongest when it protects individual rights first, because once those rights are weakened, it becomes too easy for authorities or majorities to justify unfair treatment in the name of the common good. From my perspective, collective interests matter, but they should be pursued through rules that still respect personal freedom and dignity. In practice, a healthy society balances both, rather than putting society above the individual by default.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Bagi saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh diprioritaskan secara mutlak di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika kita sudah sering melihat alasan "demi kebaikan bersama" dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa. Hak individu harus menjadi batas yang jelas, bukan penghalang yang bisa disingkirkan kapan saja mayoritas merasa itu lebih efisien atau lebih aman. Tentu ada situasi tertentu seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan, tetapi pembatasannya harus sempit, transparan, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, masyarakat justru menjadi lebih lemah karena kebebasan dan martabat orang per orang terkikis.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over individual rights, because that is exactly how abuse gets justified. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how easily “for the public good” can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or excuse unfair treatment, so I do not trust that phrase without strict limits. Society does matter, but its interests should be pursued through laws that protect dignity, freedom, and due process, not by treating the individual as disposable. In real life, a strong community is built when people are protected first, not when their rights are sacrificed whenever the majority wants convenience or control.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Bagi saya, pernyataan itu terlalu berbahaya kalau dijadikan prinsip umum, karena di Amerika saya melihat berkali-kali bagaimana alasan “demi masyarakat” dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan yang berlebihan dan penyalahgunaan kuasa. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak individu yang jelas, terutama saat mayoritas atau pemerintah merasa paling tahu apa yang “baik”. Saya tidak menolak tindakan kolektif untuk kesehatan publik atau keamanan, tetapi pembatasannya harus sempit, sementara, dan benar-benar bisa diuji secara transparan. Kalau hak individu selalu dikalahkan oleh klaim kepentingan sosial, yang terjadi bukan masyarakat yang kuat, melainkan masyarakat yang mudah menindas orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree with the statement because in my view society becomes weaker, not stronger, when individual rights are treated as secondary by default. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how “for the public interest” can be used to silence dissent, pressure minorities, or excuse unfair treatment, so I do not trust that logic unless it is tightly limited and accountable. Public health and security can justify some restrictions, but only when they are narrow, temporary, and respectful of due process. If we make the individual disposable for the sake of society, we end up protecting power more than people.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena menurut saya di Amerika alasan “demi kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa dan pembatasan yang kebablasan. Kepentingan publik memang ada dan kadang perlu didahulukan dalam keadaan tertentu, seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan, tetapi hak individu harus tetap menjadi batas yang tegas, bukan sesuatu yang bisa disingkirkan hanya karena mayoritas merasa itu lebih nyaman. Saya juga tidak setuju dengan gagasan bahwa masyarakat otomatis menjadi lebih kuat kalau individu dikorbankan; justru yang terjadi sering kali adalah orang yang paling rentan kehilangan perlindungan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat adalah masyarakat yang mampu mengejar kebaikan bersama tanpa menjadikan hak dasar orang per orang sebagai korban.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
